Notes: Prerequisite establishes rrset_exists for n.campus.edu. A, then the UPDATE attempts delete_rr for a different A RR at the same owner name that is not present. The query checks whether the surviving A RRset remains unchanged after the UPDATE and allows observation of reply-vs-post-state divergence.

Steps.Description: Delete a nonexistent A RR from an existing A RRset after a satisfied rrset_exists prerequisite.

Steps.Name: n.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the existing A RRset remains unchanged after the UPDATE.
